WITH seg AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
perc AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons2013 - cons2012) / NULLIF(cons2013,0)) * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM seg
)
SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct
FROM perc
ORDER BY pct DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct
FROM perc
ORDER BY pct ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM (
  SELECT
    ((CAST(substr(champ_time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
      CAST(substr(champ_time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
      CAST(substr(champ_time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
      CAST(substr(champ_time,10,3) AS INTEGER)) AS champ_ms,
    ((CAST(substr(last_time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
      CAST(substr(last_time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
      CAST(substr(last_time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
      CAST(substr(last_time,10,3) AS INTEGER)) AS last_ms
  FROM (
    SELECT
      r1.time AS champ_time,
      r2.time AS last_time
    FROM results r1
    JOIN results r2 ON r1.raceId = r2.raceId
    WHERE r1.raceId = (
          SELECT raceId
          FROM races
          WHERE year = 2008
            AND name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%'
        )
      AND r1.position = 1
      AND r2.position = (
          SELECT MAX(position)
          FROM results
          WHERE raceId = r1.raceId
        )
  ) AS t
) AS ms;	----- bird -----	formula_1

471:
WITH female AS (
    SELECT c.client_id,
           c.birth_date,
           d.A11 AS avg_salary,
           disp.account_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    JOIN disp ON disp.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_birth AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_birth FROM female
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT f.*
    FROM female f
    JOIN oldest_birth ob ON f.birth_date = ob.oldest_birth
),
lowest_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS lowest_salary FROM female
),
oldest_lowest AS (
    SELECT f.*
    FROM oldest_females f
    JOIN lowest_avg la ON f.avg_salary = la.lowest_salary
),
salary_range AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_salary,
           MIN(avg_salary) AS min_salary
    FROM female
)
SELECT ol.account_id,
       (SELECT max_salary - min_salary FROM salary_range) AS gap
FROM oldest_lowest ol;	----- bird -----	financial
